title: Fifi the Fox's Celebration Adventure
description: Join Fifi the Fox on an exciting celebration adventure!

pages.text: Fifi the Fox woke up. The sun was bright. She saw blue sky and smiled. “Today I want to have a celebration!” she said. She called her friends.
Fifi ran to Milo the Mouse. “Will you come to my party?” she asked. Milo squeaked, “Yes!” Then she ran to Bruno, Bella, Oliver, and Dottle. All said yes!
In the sunny meadow, Fifi spread a big red blanket. Bruno brought berries. Bella brought carrots. Dottle brought shiny stones. Oliver brought a song. They all shared and smiled.
Fifi said, “Let’s play hide and seek!” Milo hid behind a flower. Bruno rolled in the grass. Bella hopped in circles. Oliver hooted, “Ready or not, here I come!” They laughed and cheered.
Now it was time for cake! Fifi had a big fruit cake with red berries on top. She cut slices for everyone. “Yummy!” said Dottle. Each friend took a bite and felt warm and happy.
The friends danced in a circle. “We love our party!” shouted Milo. They hugged each other. The sun set, but their hearts glowed. “See you soon!” called Fifi. Everyone smiled, ready for more fun.
